Interrupt Pending

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x1000
Size:
0x4
Array Dimensions:
[4]
Array Stride:
+0x4
Total Size:
0x10
Source:
plic_rf.rdl

Description

Read-only bitmap of pending interrupts. Bit N of register K represents interrupt source ID (K*32 + N). Bit 0 of pending[0] is hardwired to 0 (ID 0 unused). A pending bit is set when an interrupt is asserted and cleared on claim.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:0] pending r - Pending
